# Triage Labels

When a skill mentions a role (e.g. "apply the AFK-ready triage label"), use the
corresponding string from the appropriate column.

| Label | Status string | Meaning |
|-------|--------------|---------|
| needs-triage | `needs-triage` | Maintainer needs to evaluate this issue |
| needs-info   | `needs-info`   | Waiting on reporter for more information |
| ready-for-agent | `ready-for-agent` | Fully specified, ready for an AI agent |
| ready-for-human | `ready-for-human` | Requires human implementation |
| wontfix      | `wontfix`      | Will not be actioned |

Edit the table to match whatever vocabulary you actually use.
